name: safetyCompliance
_note: LENS_ACTIONS handler (server/domains/construction.js, registerLensAction('construction','safetyCompliance',...)) — reached only via /api/lens/run on key 'construction.safetyCompliance' (3-arg handler, virtualArtifact.data === input). DETERMINISTIC: complianceRate = round(passed/total × 100) (total floors at 1, so 0..100 always); OSHA TRIR = round(incidents/hoursWorked × 200000 × 100)/100 when hoursWorked > 0 else 0 (no divide-by-zero). POISON: hoursWorked/workerCount via parseInt — 'Infinity'/'1e999' → finite, negative or 0 hours → incidentRate 0; every total stays FINITE. Empty/absent/non-array checklist degrades graceful (100% of 0→1 floor, or caught handler_error), never throws. The GC-bench panel double-wraps; calcData() peels the layer so it computes identically. NOT macro-assassin-driven (LENS_ACTIONS, not MACROS); authored spec pinned by server/tests/construction-lens-macros.test.js.
